raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Racial Justice Act will prohibit the use of race, ethnicity, or national origin in sentencing and convictions.",
    "Systemic racial disparities are pervasive in mass incarceration in California.",
    "Black men are over eight times more likely to be incarcerated than white men.",
    "The Racial Justice Act would prohibit the state from using explicit bias against a defendant based on race, ethnicity, or national origin.",
    "The Racial Justice Act would prohibit the state from using statistical disparities in charging, sentencing, and conviction.",
    "The Racial Justice Act would prohibit the state from using bias at trial and in jury selection.",
    "The California Racial Justice Act aims to confront systemic racism in the criminal legal system.",
    "Persistent racial discrimination exists in the criminal legal system."
  ]
}
```
